articles.title: Solana Price Prediction as $500 Million Trading Volume Floods In – SOL Pump Incoming?
articles.description: The SOL token, which powers the Solana smart contracts ecosystem, is currently trading at $20.1, 60% above the lowest price point in 2022, and 30% above the lows experienced in March 2023, indicating a significant upward trend.
